artifact_summary: IT network topology for the City of Tampa Wastewater Department's Advanced Wastewater Treatment Plant.
artifact_blurb: Detailed network diagram illustrating the IT infrastructure architecture for the City of Tampa Wastewater Department's Advanced Wastewater Treatment Plant, mapping data pathways between Programmable Logic Controllers (PLCs), network switches, and control consoles within critical facility zones including the Sludge Control Building and Screen & Grit areas.
